moments.title: Spain lift World Cup 2026 trophy
moments.blurb: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final yesterday, July 19th, in a thrilling conclusion to the tournament co-hosted by the USA, Mexico, and Canada.

angles.name: General reaction
angles.copy: Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions! After weeks of incredible football, the final whistle blew yesterday. What a tournament it was! #WorldCup2026

angles.name: UK angle
angles.copy: While England reached the third-place play-off, it was Spain who lifted the World Cup trophy yesterday! Did you catch the final?

moments.title: Ryan Fox wins The Open Championship
moments.blurb: New Zealander Ryan Fox claimed the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale yesterday, July 19th, winning The 154th Open Championship by one stroke.

angles.name: General reaction
angles.copy: What a finish at Royal Birkdale! Ryan Fox is your Champion Golfer of the Year after an incredible performance at The Open, wrapping up yesterday.

angles.name: Golf fans
angles.copy: Another Open Championship for the history books! Ryan Fox takes the Claret Jug home after a gripping final round yesterday. Where does this rank in your favourite Opens?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at Number 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart for the week of July 16 - July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Chart update
angles.copy: Still at the top! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are holding strong at UK Number 1 with 'Rein Me In' this week. Can anyone knock them off?

angles.name: New entries
angles.copy: Also making waves on the chart this week: Sienna Spiro, Journey, Madonna, Olivia Rodrigo, Shakira & Burna Boy all featuring!

moments.title: UK schools break for summer
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are either underway or starting this week across the UK, with England's breaking on July 23rd and Scotland's on July 21st.

angles.name: General summer vibe
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Well, for many of you across the UK, at least. Have a fantastic summer break everyone!

angles.name: Local Wales
angles.copy: For our Welsh listeners, the summer holidays started back in late June, so you're already in full swing! What have your highlights been so far?

angles.name: Local England
angles.copy: England's schools are breaking up this week, with many starting their summer holidays from July 23rd! Long lie-ins and beach days are officially on the agenda for Devon!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Birthday wish
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! Still making music magic. What's your favourite Santana track? #Santana

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young! Sending birthday wishes to the legendary guitarist Carlos Santana today. Turn up 'Oye Como Va' and celebrate!

moments.title: Kim Carnes turns 81
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, known for her distinctive voice and hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday today, July 20th.

angles.name: Birthday wish
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Kim Carnes! Still got those 'Bette Davis Eyes' on loop. What a voice! #KimCarnes

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) turns 78
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, formerly known as Cat Stevens, will celebrate his 78th birthday tomorrow, July 21st.

angles.name: Birthday ahead
angles.copy: Tomorrow, July 21st, the incredible Yusuf Islam (aka Cat Stevens) turns 78! Get your 'Wild World' singalong ready. #CatStevens

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: The Eagles co-founder and drummer Don Henley will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Midweek birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley on Wednesday! What's your favourite Henley-penned track?

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Selena Gomez will celebrate her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Selena Gomez turns 34 on Wednesday. What's your go-to Selena track?

moments.title: George Clinton turns 85
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, will turn 85 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incomparable George Clinton on Wednesday! Get on up and get down to some P-Funk in celebration. #GeorgeClinton

moments.title: Slash turns 65
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist Slash will celebrate his 65th birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Sweet Child o' Mine, it's Slash's 65th birthday on Thursday! The legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist still shreds harder than anyone. #Slash

moments.title: Verdine White turns 75
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White will celebrate his 75th birthday on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Funk & Soul legend
angles.copy: Shining bright on Saturday, July 25th, as Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75! Time to groove. #EarthWindAndFire

moments.title: Rita Marley turns 80
moments.blurb: Reggae icon Rita Marley, widow of Bob Marley and a successful musician in her own right, will celebrate her 80th birthday on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Reggae royalty
angles.copy: One love, one heart – and a big happy 80th birthday to Rita Marley on Saturday! A true reggae legend. #RitaMarley

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman, still moving like Jagger. #MickJagger

angles.name: Sunday celebration
angles.copy: Start your Sunday with some Stones! Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor will celebrate his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Queen drummer
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating a birthday this Sunday! Happy 77th to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor. What's your top Queen track?

moments.title: Stormzy turns 33
moments.blurb: Grime and hip-hop superstar Stormzy will celebrate his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Grime star birthday
angles.copy: Big Mike turns 33 on Sunday! Sending birthday love to the one and only Stormzy. What's your favourite track from the king of grime? #Stormzy
